meta.title: JUAN — Photo & Videography
meta.description: Cinematic photography and videography by Juan. Portraits, weddings, fashion, and commercial storytelling crafted with precision.
meta.keywords: photographer, videographer, Juan, portrait, wedding, fashion, commercial, Indonesia

hero.title: Frames that feel like memory.
hero.subtitle: Cinematic photography & videography for people, brands, and moments that deserve to be remembered.

home.aboutBody: I build visual worlds that feel intentional — from intimate portraits to full cinematic productions. Every frame is designed to age well.
home.ctaBody: Whether it’s a private session or a full campaign — tell me your vision.

showcase.title: The gallery
showcase.subtitle: A curated selection across portrait, wedding, fashion, commercial, landscape, and film.
showcase.empty: No works in this category yet.

about.title: Juan
about.lead: I create images that breathe — deliberate composition, natural emotion, and cinematic restraint.
about.storyP1: My work sits between editorial discipline and human intimacy. I believe the strongest frames are quiet — they don’t shout, they stay.
about.storyP2: From private portraits to wedding films and brand campaigns, every project begins with listening. Then light, movement, and timing do the rest.

contact.title: Book a session
contact.subtitle: Share a little about your project. I’ll respond within 1–2 business days.

form.name: Full name
form.successBody: Thank you. I’ll get back to you shortly.
